title: D&D 5e 2024 Armor
description: Complete list of all armor with AC, requirements, and costs

armor.name: Chain Mail

effects.name: Speed Reduction
effects.description: Speed reduced by 10 feet if Strength less than 13

armor.donDoffTime: 10 minutes to don and 5 minutes to doff

armor.name: Splint Armor

effects.name: Speed Reduction
effects.description: Speed reduced by 10 feet if Strength less than 15

armor.donDoffTime: 10 minutes to don and 5 minutes to doff

armor.name: Plate Armor

effects.name: Speed Reduction
effects.description: Speed reduced by 10 feet if Strength less than 15

armor.donDoffTime: 10 minutes to don and 5 minutes to doff

armor.name: Shield
armor.donDoffTime: Utilize Action to don or doff
armor.notes: You gain the AC benefit only if you have training with shields

armorTraining.light: If you wear Light armor and lack training, you have Disadvantage on any D20 Test that involves Strength or Dexterity, and you can't cast spells
armorTraining.medium: If you wear Medium armor and lack training, you have Disadvantage on any D20 Test that involves Strength or Dexterity, and you can't cast spells
armorTraining.heavy: If you wear Heavy armor and lack training, you have Disadvantage on any D20 Test that involves Strength or Dexterity, and you can't cast spells
armorTraining.shield: You gain the Armor Class benefit of a Shield only if you have training with it

armorRules.oneAtATime: A creature can wear only one suit of armor at a time and wield only one Shield at a time
armorRules.equipmentSizes: Armor made for one creature might not fit another without alterations (variant rule)
